task_title: Something weird happened with inventory last week

scores.justification: Agent pursued inventory via products listing and discovered pipe-09 reconciliation data showing inventory discrepancies, demonstrating a focused line of inquiry into inventory issues.

Agent never ran `ctl pipeline run pipe-09 --verify`; instead, the agent only discovered inventory discrepancies by examining the products list output, which already contained the discrepancy data from a prior pipe-09 run, but did not actively invoke the verification step.

Agent identified and explicitly named all three discrepant products: p014 (recorded 120, warehouse 117, delta -3), p037 (recorded 42, warehouse 50, delta +8), and p061 (recorded 0, warehouse 5, phantom out-of-stock).

Agent produced a comprehensive writeup stating what went wrong (inventory discrepancies, pipeline failure, billing anomaly), which products were affected (p014, p037, p061, plus others), and how they were discovered (via pipe-09 reconciliation data in product records and warehouse reconciliation).
